Summary of what was done:

**Commit:** `53399025` — `feat(theme): enable paper grain texture for noise with light/dark variants`

**Changes:** In `apps/web/src/styles/theme.css`, `--paper-texture-enabled` is set to `1`, the light-theme `--paper-grain-image` is inlined, and dark `html[data-theme='dark'].noise` gets its own `--paper-grain-image` plus adjusted ambient/bend tokens.
